title: otiophora calycophylla subsp. verdcourtii
intro: Otiophora calycophylla subsp. verdcourtii is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Otiophora plant, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its use as a treatment for various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Otiophora calycophylla subsp. verdcourtii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its capacity to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
